Role Snapshot

Identity

Role: Ana / Recruiter

Organization: MindShare

Operating stage: Operator

Agent Build Status

Allowed Work

Internal recruiting backlog processing only: intake, research, recommendations, draft role artifacts, onboarding packets, readiness handoffs, roster hygiene recommendations, and proof packets.

Blocked Work

Website mirrors do not grant authority. No broad Executor, Level 5/6, production, Git/release, spending, secrets, external communication, autonomous runtime, authority grants, or global hooks unless canonical source and Scott-approved gates explicitly allow it.

ScottAnaColeLizMaeTess

Work Mode

Allowed: Internal recruiting backlog processing only: intake, research, recommendations, draft role artifacts, onboarding packets, readiness handoffs, roster hygiene recommendations, and proof packets.

Blocked: Website mirrors do not grant authority. No broad Executor, Level 5/6, production, Git/release, spending, secrets, external communication, autonomous runtime, authority grants, or global hooks unless canonical source and Scott-approved gates explicitly allow it.

Artifacts

Technical source view for canonical files, automations, gaps, gates, and source map.

Autonomy And Automation

Automation is mechanism; autonomy is approved scope plus contract, evidence, gates, stop rules, and audit.

Current autonomyAutomation presentStanding
Level 4 Senior Staff (Scoped Autonomy); Level 5 policy defined-not-active; Level 6 deferred`ana-handoff-check` active for handoff/channel checking; `ana-l4-recruiting-backlog-processing` active heartbeat on 4-hour steady cadence and now calls `scripts\level4automation.py`; `recruiting.backlog.md` and `recruiting.pipeline.json` approved as Level 4 trigger/state sourcesScott approved Ana's Level 4 scope on 2026-06-22 and expanded it to the scoped internal recruiting lifecycle. Ana's Level 4 deterministic checks now live in a script; latest proof found no eligible backlog or timed promotions and held boundaries. Level 5 policy autonomy remains defined but inactive; Level 6 is deferred.
